summary_lines: Top service cost in the last 30 days was AWS CloudShell at 0.0 USD.
Top optimization candidate is 'Pause failing ECS service until its image or task definition is fixed' with estimated savings of about 0.0 USD per month.

recommendations.title: Pause failing ECS service until its image or task definition is fixed
recommendations.rationale: test_def-service-vnwns50w keeps retrying failed task launches (5 recent failure events) while desiredCount remains > 0.
recommendations.recommendation: Set desiredCount to 0 or disable the service until the container image and startup path are healthy.

recommendations.title: Pause failing ECS service until its image or task definition is fixed
recommendations.rationale: test_def-service-64zgxsih keeps retrying failed task launches (5 recent failure events) while desiredCount remains > 0.
recommendations.recommendation: Set desiredCount to 0 or disable the service until the container image and startup path are healthy.

recommendations.title: Move non-production ECS service to Fargate Spot when interruption is acceptable
recommendations.rationale: test_def-service-vnwns50w looks like a non-production workload and currently uses standard Fargate capacity.
recommendations.recommendation: Switch the capacity provider strategy to FARGATE_SPOT for interrupt-tolerant environments.

recommendations.title: Review ECS task size for non-production workload
recommendations.rationale: test_def-service-vnwns50w uses a task definition sized at 1024 CPU units and 3072 MiB memory.
recommendations.recommendation: Validate actual CPU and memory usage and reduce the Fargate task size if headroom is consistently high.

recommendations.title: Move non-production ECS service to Fargate Spot when interruption is acceptable
recommendations.rationale: test_def-service-64zgxsih looks like a non-production workload and currently uses standard Fargate capacity.
recommendations.recommendation: Switch the capacity provider strategy to FARGATE_SPOT for interrupt-tolerant environments.

recommendations.title: Review ECS task size for non-production workload
recommendations.rationale: test_def-service-64zgxsih uses a task definition sized at 1024 CPU units and 3072 MiB memory.
recommendations.recommendation: Validate actual CPU and memory usage and reduce the Fargate task size if headroom is consistently high.

recommendations.title: Review test or temporary Lambda for removal
recommendations.rationale: test-lambda-integration looks like a test or temporary function that may no longer be needed.
recommendations.recommendation: Confirm recent usage and delete the function if it is no longer serving a workflow.

recommendations.title: Review test or temporary Lambda for removal
recommendations.rationale: hello-world-fn looks like a test or temporary function that may no longer be needed.
recommendations.recommendation: Confirm recent usage and delete the function if it is no longer serving a workflow.

recommendations.title: Review S3 lifecycle policies
recommendations.rationale: aws-dev-agent-codebuild-artifacts-027087672282-us-east-1 has no lifecycle rules in the snapshot.
recommendations.recommendation: Add lifecycle policies or review Intelligent-Tiering for stale objects and incomplete multipart uploads.

recommendations.title: Review S3 lifecycle policies
recommendations.rationale: hippa-signer-artifacts-027087672282 has no lifecycle rules in the snapshot.
recommendations.recommendation: Add lifecycle policies or review Intelligent-Tiering for stale objects and incomplete multipart uploads.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Disabled event source mapping may indicate a paused or unused workflow
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Confirm whether this flow is still needed. Remove the mapping or retire the upstream queue/stream if the workflow is gone.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Enabled event source mapping is failing to process
unused_or_waste_findings.why: PROBLEM: Lambda failed to assume your function execution role. Please check if the role trust Lambda service principal, and make sure it does not require setting source identity to be assumed.
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Fix the execution role or disable the mapping until the downstream path is healthy.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Disabled event source mapping may indicate a paused or unused workflow
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Confirm whether this flow is still needed. Remove the mapping or retire the upstream queue/stream if the workflow is gone.

unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Confirm whether this flow is still needed. Remove the mapping or retire the upstream queue/stream if the workflow is gone.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Disabled event source mapping may indicate a paused or unused workflow
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Confirm whether this flow is still needed. Remove the mapping or retire the upstream queue/stream if the workflow is gone.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: ECS service is retrying but has no healthy running tasks
unused_or_waste_findings.why: test_def-service-vnwns50w has desiredCount=1, runningCount=0, and 5 recent failure events.
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Set desiredCount to 0 until the image and startup path are fixed.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: ECS service is retrying but has no healthy running tasks
unused_or_waste_findings.why: test_def-service-64zgxsih has desiredCount=1, runningCount=0, and 5 recent failure events.
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Set desiredCount to 0 until the image and startup path are fixed.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Lambda function looks like test or temporary code
unused_or_waste_findings.why: test-lambda-integration matches common test or temporary naming patterns.
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Check whether it is still invoked in a real workflow and remove it if not needed.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Lambda has no discovered event source mappings and appears non-production
unused_or_waste_findings.why: test-lambda-integration has no discovered event source mappings in the snapshot.
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Confirm there are no schedules or manual invocations keeping it alive; if not, retire it.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Lambda function looks like test or temporary code
unused_or_waste_findings.why: hello-world-fn matches common test or temporary naming patterns.
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Check whether it is still invoked in a real workflow and remove it if not needed.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Lambda has no discovered event source mappings and appears non-production
unused_or_waste_findings.why: hello-world-fn has no discovered event source mappings in the snapshot.
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Confirm there are no schedules or manual invocations keeping it alive; if not, retire it.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Bucket has no lifecycle rules and may grow storage cost over time
unused_or_waste_findings.why: aws-dev-agent-codebuild-artifacts-027087672282-us-east-1 has no lifecycle rules in the snapshot.
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Add lifecycle rules for retention, archival, or incomplete multipart cleanup.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Bucket has no lifecycle rules and may grow storage cost over time
unused_or_waste_findings.why: hippa-signer-artifacts-027087672282 has no lifecycle rules in the snapshot.
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Add lifecycle rules for retention, archival, or incomplete multipart cleanup.

strengths: All discovered DynamoDB tables already use PAY_PER_REQUEST, which avoids idle provisioned capacity waste.
next_level_requirements: Cost Explorer or CUR data to attach dollar impact instead of heuristic ranking.
CloudWatch utilization history to support rightsizing with evidence.
Tag coverage by team, env, and owner to attribute spend and automate cleanup safely.
Approval workflow for stop, delete, and resize actions.
